race.comment: OLINGTON LANE (2) has exploded onto the scene with two barnstorming wins. The rise to 1400m shouldn't be a bother but he'll need to do it with the big weight on his back. Promising type. RECKLESS BEHAVIOUR (9) returns after enjoying a successful debut prep. Is drawn sticky but he did show good tactical speed last time in so expect them to cross early. Loy's booking signals stable confidence. OWN THEM (1) improved sharply second-up when chasing gamely into second at the Sapphire Coast. Strips fitter third-up and keeps the 2kg claimer on to aid the big weight. Can go one better. CAPITAL BABE (15) finally got her reward for effort last start at Canberra when putting them away to score. Draws well and should be full of confidence. GREEN PINEAPPLE (13) was an eye-catcher at Bathurst and can cause a late scare if they overdo it early.
